title: Flight Attendants
description: Monitor safety of the aircraft cabin. Provide services to airline passengers, explain safety information, serve food and beverages, and respond to emergency incidents.

tasks.text: Verify that first aid kits and other emergency equipment, including fire extinguishers and oxygen bottles, are in working order.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Announce and demonstrate safety and emergency procedures, such as the use of oxygen masks, seat belts, and life jackets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor passenger behavior to identify threats to the safety of the crew and other passengers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Walk aisles of planes to verify that passengers have complied with federal regulations prior to takeoffs and landings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and assist passengers in emergency procedures, such as evacuating a plane following an emergency landing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare passengers and aircraft for landing, following procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer first aid to passengers in distress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine special assistance needs of passengers, such as small children, the elderly, or persons with disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend preflight briefings concerning weather, altitudes, routes, emergency procedures, crew coordination, lengths of flights, food and beverage services offered, and numbers of passengers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reassure passengers when situations, such as turbulence, are encountered.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check to ensure that food, beverages, blankets, reading material, emergency equipment, and other supplies are aboard and are in adequate supply.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports showing places of departure and destination, passenger ticket numbers, meal and beverage inventories, the conditions of cabin equipment, and any problems encountered by passengers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Announce flight delays and descent preparations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Greet passengers boarding aircraft and direct them to assigned seats.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist passengers entering or disembarking the aircraft.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct periodic trips through the cabin to ensure passenger comfort and to distribute reading material, headphones, pillows, playing cards, and blankets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect and clean cabins, checking for any problems and making sure that cabins are in order.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Operate audio and video systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer passengers' questions about flights, aircraft, weather, travel routes and services, arrival times, or schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect money for meals and beverages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Heat and serve prepared foods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect passenger tickets to verify information and to obtain destination information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assist passengers in placing carry-on luggage in overhead, garment, or under-seat storage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take inventory of headsets, alcoholic beverages, and money collected.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sell alcoholic beverages to passengers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
